Product range

Every product below is batch-coded and farm-traceable. Filter by category or cuisine, click any pack to zoom, and use the cost-per-plate calculator to cost your menu.

Product power

Built for the pass, priced for the plate.

Yield guide

How far one kilo goes.

Indicative yield

1kg ≈ 160 plates

Validated per recipe with your chef. Trade rates on enquiry.

Questions professional kitchens ask

25kg per blend for direct HORECA supply. Below that, we route you to the nearest distributor so you get local delivery.

Menu-costing ideas, monthly.

One email a month on standardisation, yields and food-cost control. No spam.
